age_range.evidence: we recruited English-speaking participants from the United States through a paid Instagram ad that included a link to an initial screener survey

countries.evidence: To be included in the study, prospective participants had to live in the United States...

fieldwork_year.evidence: We conducted virtual co-design sessions with nineteen teens in summer 2021 following the initial design and development of the prototype

sample_size.evidence: We conducted an open trial field deployment (N=54) to examine the acceptability of Locus
